add-text-field-to-pdf-page.title: Add Text Field to PDF Page
add-text-field-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a text field named "CustomerName" on page 1 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

add-unchecked-checkbox-to-pdf-page.title: Insert Unchecked Checkbox Field on PDF Page
add-unchecked-checkbox-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox form field to a specific page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf and set its default state to unchecked.

add-radio-button-group-to-pdf.title: Add Radio Button Group to PDF Form
add-radio-button-group-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a radio button group named "PaymentMethod" with "Credit" and "PayPal" options on page 3 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a submit button on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade and save the modified document.

add-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-button.title: Add JavaScript Alert to PDF Push Button
add-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-button.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, attach a JavaScript alert to a push button named "ShowInfo", and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decorate-all-text-fields.title: Decorate All Text Fields in a PDF
decorate-all-text-fields.description: Shows how to use FormEditor and FormFieldFacade to set a default background, text, border colors and alignment for every text field in a PDF and save the decorated document.

center-align-pdf-form-field.title: Center Align a PDF Form Field
center-align-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to set the horizontal alignment of a PDF form field named "Address" to center using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

set-custom-image-appearance-for-pdf-sign.title: Set Custom Image Appearance for PDF Signature Field
set-custom-image-appearance-for-pdf-sign.description: Shows how to change the visual appearance of a signature field in a PDF by assigning a custom background image using the PdfFileSignature facade.

set-form-field-attribute-with-formeditor.title: Set Form Field Attribute Using FormEditor
set-form-field-attribute-with-formeditor.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with FormEditor, setting a predefined field attribute (Required flag) via SetFieldAttribute, and saving the modified document, highlighting the limitation of custom attributes.

set-numeric-limit-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Numeric Limit for PDF Form Field Using SetFieldLimit
set-numeric-limit-for-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to restrict the "Quantity" form field to values between 1 and 100 by applying a character limit with FormEditor.SetFieldLimit.

add-list-item-to-dropdown-field.title: Add List Item to Dropdown Field in PDF
add-list-item-to-dropdown-field.description: Shows how to insert a new option into a combo box (dropdown) form field of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-list-item-from-pdf-form.title: Remove List Item from PDF Form Field
remove-list-item-from-pdf-form.description: Shows how to delete a specific list item ("Option B") from a list box field named "Choices" on a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

copy-pdf-form-field-value.title: Copy PDF Form Field Value to Another Field
copy-pdf-form-field-value.description: Demonstrates how to read the value of a form field (SourceNotes) from a PDF and write it to another field (TargetNotes) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

clone-pdf-form-field-to-page-5.title: Clone and Rename PDF Form Field on Page 5
clone-pdf-form-field-to-page-5.description: Demonstrates how to copy the outer definition of a form field from a source PDF to page 5 of a target PDF using FormEditor, then rename the cloned field with the Form class.

move-pdf-form-field.title: Move PDF Form Field to Specific Position
move-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to relocate the form field "DateField" to a defined rectangle on page 2 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove Form Field from PDF
remove-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete an existing form field from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field with Aspose.Pdf
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to rename a form field in a PDF document using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor class.

add-email-validation-javascript-to-pdf-f.title: Add Email Validation JavaScript to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-javascript-to-pdf-f.description: Shows how to create a PDF with an Email text box and attach a JavaScript blur‑event script that validates the email format using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to FDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form fields from a PDF document into an FDF file for external processing.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an XFDF file, import its field values into an existing PDF form, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-hidden-processeddate-field.title: Batch Add Hidden ProcessedDate Field to PDFs
batch-add-hidden-processeddate-field.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF files in a folder and add a hidden text field named "ProcessedDate" containing a generated GUID to each document using Aspose.Pdf.

decorate-checkbox-fields-in-pdfs.title: Decorate All Checkbox Fields in PDFs
decorate-checkbox-fields-in-pdfs.description: Shows how to apply consistent visual styling to every checkbox form field across multiple PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

update-submit-button-urls-in-pdfs.title: Update Submit Button URLs in PDFs
update-submit-button-urls-in-pdfs.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files and change the URL of every form submit button using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

clear-and-repopulate-dropdown-field.title: Clear and Repopulate Dropdown Field in PDF
clear-and-repopulate-dropdown-field.description: Shows how to remove existing items from a PDF combo box (dropdown) field and add new list items using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

populate-pdf-list-box-with-country-names.title: Populate PDF List Box with Country Names
populate-pdf-list-box-with-country-names.description: Shows how to bind a PDF form and add 195 country names to a list box field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

set-readonly-currency-formatting-for-pdf.title: Set Read‑Only Currency Formatting for PDF Form Field
set-readonly-currency-formatting-for-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, makes the 'TotalAmount' form field read‑only, and applies appearance flags to prepare it for currency formatting using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-js-clear-discountcode-on-focus.title: Add JavaScript to Clear DiscountCode Field on Focus
add-js-clear-discountcode-on-focus.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a text box form field named 'DiscountCode', and attach a JavaScript action that clears the field when it receives focus.

copy-form-fields-from-template-to-pdf.title: Copy Form Fields from Template PDF to Target PDF
copy-form-fields-from-template-to-pdf.description: Shows how to copy form field definitions from a template PDF into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and FormEditor, then save the modified document.

move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.title: Move PDF Form Fields by Offset
move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.description: Shows how to shift every form field in a PDF document by a specified X and Y offset using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

batch-rename-pdf-form-fields.title: Batch Rename PDF Form Fields from Old_ to New_
batch-rename-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to open a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, iterate over its fields, rename those that start with a specific prefix, and save the updated document.

set-multiline-property-for-pdf-form-text.title: Set Multiline Property for PDF Form Text Field
set-multiline-property-for-pdf-form-text.description: Shows how to convert a single‑line text field to a multiline field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-2-point-border-to-pdf-form-field.title: Apply 2-Point Border to PDF Form Field
apply-2-point-border-to-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom border thickness of 2 points for the form field named "Signature" in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades FormEditor.

set-form-field-background-color.title: Set Form Field Background Color to Light Green
set-form-field-background-color.description: Shows how to change the background color of a specific PDF form field using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

add-hidden-sessionid-field-to-pdfs-batch.title: Add Hidden SessionId Field to PDFs in Batch
add-hidden-sessionid-field-to-pdfs-batch.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over a folder of PDF files, generate a unique GUID for each, and add it as a hidden TextBoxField named SessionId to the first page of every document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-validation-to-pdf-submit-.title: Add JavaScript Validation to PDF Submit Button
add-javascript-validation-to-pdf-submit-.description: Demonstrates how to add a submit button to a PDF and attach JavaScript that validates required fields before submitting using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form field definitions and values from a PDF document to a JSON file with pretty‑printed output.

import-form-fields-from-json.title: Import Form Fields from JSON into a PDF
import-form-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates reading field definitions from a JSON file and adding corresponding form fields to a newly created PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

set-phone-number-field-limit.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Form Field
set-phone-number-field-limit.description: Shows how to limit the "PhoneNumber" form field to 15 characters in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

set-date-field-format-pdf-facades.title: Set Date Field Format in PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades
set-date-field-format-pdf-facades.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with FormEditor, locate DateField form fields, and set their display format to MM/dd/yyyy, then save the updated document.

add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.title: Add Reset Form Button to PDF
add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a push button into a PDF that clears all form fields when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decorate-radio-buttons-with-custom-icons.title: Decorate Radio Buttons with Custom Icons
decorate-radio-buttons-with-custom-icons.description: Shows how to apply custom selected and unselected icons to all radio button fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

restrict-pdf-form-field-to-integer-range.title: Restrict PDF Form Field to Integer Range 0-100
restrict-pdf-form-field-to-integer-range.description: Shows how to configure a PDF form field so it only accepts integer values from 0 to 100 by setting a character limit and adding JavaScript validation with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

attach-javascript-validation-to-pdf-form.title: Attach JavaScript Validation to PDF Form Field
attach-javascript-validation-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor, attach a JavaScript validation script to the "Age" field, and save the modified document.

copy-image-field-to-another-field.title: Copy Image Field Content to Another PDF Form Field
copy-image-field-to-another-field.description: Demonstrates how to copy the inner content of an existing image form field ("Logo") to a new image field ("HeaderLogo") in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-empty-pdf-form-field.title: Remove Empty PDF Form Field Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
remove-empty-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF form field's value and delete the field when it contains no user input, using the FormEditor and Form classes from Aspose.Pdf.

rename-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.title: Rename PDF Form Fields Using CSV Mapping
rename-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.description: Demonstrates how to load a field‑name mapping from a CSV file and rename AcroForm/XFA fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF
add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Shows how to add a signature field named "DigitalSignature" to a PDF using FormEditor and then digitally sign that field with a PKCS#1 certificate, optionally applying a graphic appearance.

set-pdf-form-field-required.title: Set PDF Form Field as Required with Asterisk Indicator
set-pdf-form-field-required.description: Demonstrates how to mark a PDF form field as required using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor, which displays the asterisk indicator on the field.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-text-fields.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Text Form Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-text-fields.description: Shows how to set a custom font (Arial Bold) for every text form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

batch-add-selectall-checkbox.title: Batch Add SelectAll Checkbox to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-selectall-checkbox.description: Shows how to loop through PDFs in a folder and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to add a checkbox field named "SelectAll" on the first page of each document, then save the modified files.

move-footer-note-to-bottom-margin.title: Move FooterNote Field to Bottom Margin on All PDF Pages
move-footer-note-to-bottom-margin.description: Shows how to reposition an existing form field to the bottom margin of each page using Aspose.Pdf Facades' FormEditor.

set-field-appearance-format-price.title: Set Field Appearance and Format Price Field in PDF
set-field-appearance-format-price.description: Demonstrates how to set appearance flags for a PDF form field using FormEditor and fill the field with a value formatted to two decimal places using the Form class.

attach-javascript-update-total-price.title: Attach JavaScript to Update Total Price in PDF Form
attach-javascript-update-total-price.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a JavaScript action to the "Quantity" field of a PDF form so that the "TotalPrice" field is automatically recalculated when the quantity changes.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export the form fields of a PDF document into an XML file for archival and later re‑import.

import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Import PDF Form Fields from XML Preserving Order
import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to import form field values from an XML file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, while keeping the original field order intact.

add-list-box-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add List Box Field to PDF Form
add-list-box-field-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a ListBox form field named "Priority" with items Low, Medium, High and set the default value to Medium in an existing PDF.

remove-button-fields-from-pdf-form.title: Remove Button Fields from PDF Form
remove-button-fields-from-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF form and delete all push‑button fields using Aspose.Pdf facades.

rename-duplicate-form-fields-during-pdf-.title: Rename Duplicate Form Fields During PDF Concatenation
rename-duplicate-form-fields-during-pdf-.description: Demonstrates merging multiple PDFs while automatically renaming duplicate form field names by appending an incremental suffix using PdfFileEditor.

add-email-validation-script-to-pdf-form-.title: Add Email Validation Script to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-script-to-pdf-form-.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript regular‑expression validation script to an "Email" form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-header-image-and-center-form-field.title: Add Header Image and Center Align Form Field
add-header-image-and-center-form-field.description: Creates a PDF with a textbox form field named "Header", adds a background header image to each page, and decorates the field so its text is centered.

add-hidden-version-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Hidden Version Field to PDF Form
add-hidden-version-field-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a hidden numeric field named "Version" to an existing PDF form and set its value using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

copy-and-rename-form-field-on-page.title: Copy and Rename Form Field on Specific PDF Page
copy-and-rename-form-field-on-page.description: Demonstrates how to copy the outer definition of a form field to a specific page and rename it using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

move-signature-field-to-lower-right-corn.title: Move Signature Field to Lower Right Corner on Page 5
move-signature-field-to-lower-right-corn.description: Shows how to relocate an existing 'Signature' form field to the lower‑right corner of page 5 in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form-fi.title: Set Rich Text Formatting for PDF Form Field
set-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form-fi.description: Shows how to enable rich‑text input, define a default appearance, and assign rich‑text content to a RichTextBoxField named "Comments" using the Aspose.Pdf Facade API.

add-javascript-populate-date-field.title: Add JavaScript to Populate Date Field on PDF Open
add-javascript-populate-date-field.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to bind a PDF, attach a document‑open JavaScript action that fills a form field named "Date" with the current date, and save the modified file.

export-checkbox-fields-to-fdf.title: Export Checkbox Fields to FDF
export-checkbox-fields-to-fdf.description: Shows how to extract only checkbox form fields from a PDF and export their definitions to an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-checkboxes-from-fdf-merge-pdf.title: Import Checkboxes from FDF and Merge into PDF
import-checkboxes-from-fdf-merge-pdf.description: Shows how to import checkbox definitions from an FDF file into an existing PDF using the Form facade, adding only new fields and saving the merged document.

add-state-combo-box-to-pdf-form.title: Add State Combo Box to PDF Form
add-state-combo-box-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a combo box field named "State" into a PDF form and fill it with U.S. state abbreviations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-non-whitelisted-list-items.title: Remove Non-Whitelisted Items from a PDF List Field
remove-non-whitelisted-list-items.description: Shows how to delete entries from a PDF form list field that are not part of a predefined whitelist using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.title: Set TaxRate Field to Read‑Only and Calculate Value with JavaScript
set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.description: Shows how to make a PDF form field read‑only and attach a JavaScript snippet that computes the tax rate from the Subtotal field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decorate-list-fields-uniform-border.title: Apply Uniform Border and Background to List Fields
decorate-list-fields-uniform-border.description: Demonstrates how to set a common background color, border color, style, and width for list‑type form fields (list boxes and combo boxes) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rename-pdf-form-fields-to-camelcase.title: Rename PDF Form Fields to camelCase
rename-pdf-form-fields-to-camelcase.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF form fields with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, rename each field to camelCase, and save the updated document.

add-print-button-to-pdf.title: Add Print Button to PDF with JavaScript
add-print-button-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button field into a PDF and attach JavaScript that opens the print dialog using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

hide-pdf-form-field-exportable.title: Hide PDF Form Field While Keeping It Exportable
hide-pdf-form-field-exportable.description: Demonstrates how to set a PDF form field to hidden using the FormEditor facade while ensuring the field remains exportable in form submissions.

copy-notes-to-summary.title: Copy Notes Field to Summary in PDF Form
copy-notes-to-summary.description: Shows how to retrieve the value of a PDF form field and copy it to another field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

shift-form-fields-on-pdf-page.title: Shift Form Fields on Specific PDF Page
shift-form-fields-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to move form fields (and other page content) on page 2 of a PDF by shifting the page origin 5 points to the right using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

restrict-discount-field-numeric-two-deci.title: Restrict PDF Form Field to Numeric Input with Two Decimal Precision
restrict-discount-field-numeric-two-deci.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf Facades to configure a PDF form field so it accepts only numeric values with two decimal places.

attach-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit.title: Attach Confirmation Dialog to PDF Submit Button
attach-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf Facades FormEditor to add JavaScript to a submit button that displays a confirmation dialog before the form is submitted.

add-gender-radio-button-group.title: Add Gender Radio Button Group to PDF
add-gender-radio-button-group.description: Shows how to create a radio button group named "Gender" with options Male, Female, Other and set a default selection using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

remove-temporary-form-fields-from-pdf.title: Remove Temporary Form Fields from PDF
remove-temporary-form-fields-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, enumerate its fields, and delete any field whose name starts with "Temp_" using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

set-address-field-auto-wrap-dynamic-heig.title: Set Address Field to Auto‑Wrap and Dynamic Height
set-address-field-auto-wrap-dynamic-heig.description: Demonstrates how to convert a single‑line text field to a multi‑line field, enable word‑wrap, and allow the field height to grow automatically using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden AuthToken Field to PDF
add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates generating a secure random token and inserting it as a hidden TextBoxField in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate PDF Form Field Using FormEditor
duplicate-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to copy an existing form field named "Signature" to a new field "SignatureCopy" on the same page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

move-pdf-form-field-to-top-left.title: Move PDF Form Field to Top‑Left Corner with Specific Size
move-pdf-form-field-to-top-left.description: Demonstrates how to reposition a form field (e.g., a logo) to the top‑left corner of the first page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with a defined width and height.

apply-phone-number-input-mask-to-pdf-for.title: Apply Phone Number Input Mask to PDF Form Field
apply-phone-number-input-mask-to-pdf-for.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, set a character limit, and attach JavaScript to enforce a (###) ###‑#### mask on a PhoneNumber form field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

attach-reset-form-js-clear-hidden-fields.title: Attach Reset Form JavaScript that Clears Hidden Fields
attach-reset-form-js-clear-hidden-fields.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf Facades FormEditor to bind a PDF, attach JavaScript to a button that resets the form and clears hidden fields, and save the updated document.

export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Field Layout to JSON
export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.description: The example loads a PDF, accesses its form fields via the Form facade, and exports the fields together with their layout rectangles to a formatted JSON file.

import-form-field-layout-from-json.title: Import Form Field Layout from JSON into PDF
import-form-field-layout-from-json.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON file that defines form field positions and types, then adding those fields to a newly created PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.
